description: Concrete parameters for the sample inheritance split: the agreed target weights (mother 30%, child 1 35%, child 2 35%) and the resulting per-portfolio share allocations for the two highest-priced positions (Lindt & Sprüngli PS and Lindt & Sprüngli registered) where the round-lot constraint binds. The remaining 28 stocks and 5 bonds drop out of this file because at their lower per-unit price the rounding error from this two-step illustration already absorbs most of the residual; the full walk is implemented by the formulas in portfolio_split_calc.json. All referenced concepts (portfolios, target weight) live canonically in portfolio_split_calc.json, the tickers in portfolio_instruments.json; they are re-declared here name-only (words) or with their canonical from/verb/to (triples) so this file imports on its own.

sources.name: split agreement
sources.description: the family's written agreement that fixes the 30/35/35 split weights and signs off on the resulting per-position allocations
